words.def: workplace consisting of farm buildings and cultivated land as a unit
a terrorist organization that seeks to overthrow the government dominated by Tutsi and to institute Hutu control again
words.zh: a. 遠的, 久遠的, 遙遠的

words.def: a human limb; technically the part of the superior limb between the shoulder and the elbow but commonly used to refer to the whole superior limb
words.zh: n. 手臂, 袖子, 狹長港灣, 武器
